    Autonomous AI agents for customer engagement across every touchpoint.

    Developers

    Industrial
    Autonomous AI support for industrial equipment and fleets.

Terms & Conditions

Please read these terms carefully before using our website and services.

Welcome to the official website of 5Y Holdings Pte. Ltd. (5.Y). By accessing or using this site, you agree to the terms outlined below.

The Basics

The content provided on this website is intended for general informational purposes and may be modified at any time without prior notice. While we aim to ensure the accuracy of our content, we cannot guarantee that the site will always be error-free or uninterrupted. These Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) only apply to this website. 5.Y Products and Services are governed with separate T&Cs.

Intellectual Property

Some of the materials, including text, images, and branding, are the exclusive property of 5.Y. You may not copy, reproduce, modify, or distribute any content without prior written consent from 5.Y.

Cookies and Analytics

This website uses cookies and tracking technologies to improve functionality and analyze visitor behavior. By using this site, you consent to the use of cookies. For more details, please review our Privacy Policy.

Third-Party Links

This website may include links to external websites for your convenience. 5.Y is not responsible for the content, accuracy, or practices of these third-party websites.

Limitation of Liability

5.Y is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this website, including errors, omissions, or reliance on third-party links.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Singapore, the jurisdiction in which 5.Y operates.

Policy Updates

We may update these Terms & Conditions periodically. Continued use of this website implies acceptance of the latest terms.

For any inquiries or concerns regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at info@five-whys.com.
